name: How is fault determined if a GEO service causes my firm harm?
description: Breach, negligence, fraud proven by evidence.[1] Show causation.

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined if a GEO service causes my firm harm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Breach, negligence, fraud proven by evidence.[1] Show causation.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Fault hinges on contract breaches, negligence in advice, or fraudulent claims by the GEO provider.** Courts apply standard tort and contract law.[1]

Provider must prove reasonable care; plaintiffs show causation and damages.[1] Same in Houston or Philly.

**Key factors:**
- Did they follow industry best practices?[9]
- Direct link to your losses?
- Mitigation efforts by you.
- Expert testimony on AEO norms.

Document non-performance early; consider arbitration clauses. Strong cases settle fast.
